name: AAP Turret
tooltip: > Engages closest visible enemy within <C>25 m</> on activation
> Deals <C>20-10</> ballistic damage, <C>600 rpm</>, <C>50</> round capacity
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>25%</> increased range and ammo capacity
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Anchor
tooltip: > Can be used by Nano-wire to attach and pull towards location
> Restores <C>25</> aux power and an aerial maneuver charge on pull
> Useable by allies
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>4 s</> Overcharge on pull

name: Bolster
tooltip: > While active: Bleed and knockdown immunity, <C>200</> max defense, <C>0 s</> defense regen delay, <C>40 /s</> defense regeneration
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> increased duration
<B>> While active:</> <C>50%</> <B>reduced speed and vitals restored from all sources</>

name: Spike
tooltip: > Deals <C>25</> vital damage, <C>4 s</> Disable and Snare to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies, executes if target below <C>25%</> vitals
> Destroys visible or detected devices
<B>> Unable to use Neuro-Link devices for</> <C>2 s</> <B>on successful Neuro-Link</>

name: Combust
tooltip: > Deals <C>25</> Burn damage and Burn+ to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies, damage increased by <C>25%</> per addtional enemy
<B>> Unable to use Neuro-Link devices for</> <C>2 s</> <B>on successful Neuro-Link</>

name: Parasite
tooltip: > Deals <C>5</> vitals damage every <C>0.5 s</> for <C>2.5 s</> to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies
> <C>200%</> of damage dealt restored to allies vitals and max vitals
<B>> Unable to use Neuro-Link devices for</> <C>2 s</> <B>on successful Neuro-Link</>

name: Desync
tooltip: > Deals <C>5</> vital damage, <C>6 s</> Desync to visible and up to <C>6</> detected enemies, damage increased by <C>5</> per additional enemy
> Desync: Scrambles radar, reverses IFF for detections and targeting systems
<B>> Unable to use Neuro-Link devices for</> <C>2 s</> <B>on successful Neuro-Link</>

name: Pathogen
tooltip: > Applies <C>2 s</> Corrode+ to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies
<B>> Unable to use Neuro-Link devices for</> <C>2 s</> <B>on successful Neuro-Link</>

name: Deadzone
tooltip: > Creates <C>16 m</> disruptive zone on activation
> Disable and Snare to enemies within zone
> Disables enemy devices within zone
> Shroud to allies within zone
> Can attach to surfaces
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>5</> vital damage every <C>0.5 s</> to enemies within Deadzone

name: Detonator
tooltip: > Deals <C>125-50</> explosive damage and knockback to targets within <C>2-4 m</> on activation
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> reduced activation delay
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Disrupter
tooltip: > <C>4 s</> Disable+, and Snare to targets within <C>6 m</> on activation
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> reduced activation delay

name: Firecracker
tooltip: > Deals <C>25-15</> explosive and <C>50-30</> Burn damage to targets within <C>2-3 m</> and launches <C>10</> incendiary projectiles on impact
> Deals <C>100</> Burn damage to targets within <C>5 m</> and launches <C>15</> incendiary projectiles on activation
> Incendiary projectile: Detonates after <C>1 s</>, igniting surface and dealing <C>5</> explosive and <C>5</> Burn damage to targets within <C>2 m</>
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>100%</> increased duration

name: Laser Wire
tooltip: > Deals <C>75</> vital damage, <C>10 /s</> Bleed and <C>4 s</> Snare to enemies on activation
> <C>2</> charges
> Can attach to surfaces
> Maximum Efficiency: Applies hemorrhage
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Overcharge
tooltip: > While active: Disable immunity, <C>10%</> increased ground and climb speed, Disable enemies and enemy devices within <C>3 m</> for <C>2 s</>
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> increased duration

name: Proximity Mine
tooltip: > Deals <C>125-50</> explosive damage, knockback to targets within <C>2-5 m</> on activation
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> reduced activation delay
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Relocator
tooltip: > Relocate to device location on activation, removes tagged
> Telefrag targets within <C>1 m</> on relocation
> <C>2 s</> Disable to enemies and devices within <C>3 m</> on relocation
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50</> vitals and max vitals restored on activation
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Reserve Stim
tooltip: > <C>25</> vitals restored on activation, chemical heal
> <C>5 s</> Bleed immunity if used while Bleeding
> Maximum Efficiency: Becomes potent

name: Satchel Charge
tooltip: > Deals <C>150-50</> explosive damage, knockback and knockdown to targets within <C>2-5 m</> on activation
> Can attach to surfaces and Shells
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> of damage dealt as additional Burn damage
<B>> Can be Disabled</>

name: Shroud
tooltip: > While active: Undetectable by all equipment
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> increased duration

name: Tempest
tooltip: > Creates multiple charged nano-particle clouds on activation
> Clouds obscure vision, detect enemies and apply <C>5 s</> Overcharge to allies on contact
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>100%</> increased duration
<B>> Can be cleared with fire</>

name: Tox grenade
tooltip: > Creates toxic cloud on impact, spreading to nearby surfaces
> Cloud obscures vision, applies <C>2 s</> Snare and Corrode to enemies on contact
> Ignites on contact with fire, dealing explosive and Burn damage to nearby targets
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>100%</> increased duration

name: Hyper
tooltip: > On activate: Restores <C>100</> aux power and gain <C>4</> aerial maneuver charges
> While active: Snare immunity, <C>100%</> increased aux power regeneration, <C>100%</> reduced loadout speed penalty
> Maximum Efficiency: <C>50%</> increased duration
